seo.title: Mirai JPN - Japanese Language Courses and Study in Japan
seo.description: Mirai JPN is a professional center for Japanese language courses, student visa consulting, and study-in-Japan preparation.
seo.ogTitle: Mirai JPN - Japanese Language Courses and Study in Japan
seo.ogDescription: Get full guidance at Mirai JPN for Japanese language learning, student visa process, and study opportunities in Japan.
seo.ogImageAlt: Mirai JPN - Japanese language and study center

hero.title: Mirai JPN - your future
hero.subtitle: A trusted center for Japanese language and studying in Japan
hero.description: Inspiration, quality, and real results - start your new chapter with Mirai.

about.title: About us
paragraphs: Mirai JPN Japanese Language Center has been operating since 2023. Our main goal is to teach Japanese from zero with high quality and become a reliable bridge for students planning to study in Japan.

Our center has experienced Japanese language teachers. Most of them studied in Japan and hold JLPT N1-N2 and CEFR C1 levels. So far, we have helped 200+ students learn Japanese from zero and achieve levels from N5 to N2 in JLPT and NAT-TEST exams.
To expand students' knowledge and practical experience, partners and students from Japan regularly visit our center.

founders.name: TIMURKHON KHUSENZADE
founders.quote: Quality education and the right methodology are the foundation of sustainable results.
founders.bio: Timurkhon is one of the leaders responsible for Mirai's academic direction and education quality development. Based on international education experience, he builds a modern, result-oriented learning system that supports students' language growth, adaptation, and successful study in Japan.

founders.name: SAFTAROV OTABEK
founders.quote: Our mission is to unlock young people's future through global education.
founders.bio: Otabek founded Mirai with the idea of creating a reliable bridge between Uzbek youth and Japanese education. His goal is to build a clear strategy from zero for every student, combined with quality teaching and a system that leads to real outcomes.

teachers.name: Oboloqulova O'g'iloy
teachers.text: Japanese language teacher currently holding JLPT N1 and CEFR C1 levels.
educationItems: Samarkand State Institute of Foreign Languages, 2016-2020 - Philology and language teaching (Japanese), bachelor's degree
Uzbekistan State World Languages University, 2020-2022 - Linguistics (Japanese), master's degree

teachers.name: Saftarov Otabek
teachers.text: Studied for 4 years at Osaka Gakuin University and currently holds JLPT N1. He continuously supports students with documentation and study direction selection.

teachers.name: Bobojonova Feruza
teachers.text: Teaches JLPT and NAT-TEST preparation as well as practical speaking classes.
educationItems: Samarkand State Institute of Foreign Languages, 2021-2025 - Philology and language teaching (Japanese), bachelor's degree

teachers.name: Mahkamov Shohrux
teachers.text: Focuses on improving everyday speaking and writing skills.
educationItems: Samarkand State Institute of Foreign Languages, 2021-2025 - Philology and language teaching (Japanese), bachelor's degree
Japanese language proficiency level JLPT N2
Studied for one year on scholarship at the University of Tsukuba in 2024-2025

consultingCourses.title: Consulting and courses
consultingCourses.consultingTitle: Mirai JPN - student visa consulting services
consultingCourses.consultingIntro: Mirai JPN provides full consulting support for students applying to Japanese language schools and obtaining a student visa.
consultingList: Preparing and reviewing documents according to Japanese standards
Professional and accurate translation of documents from Uzbek into Japanese
Submitting and processing documents to Japanese schools
Sending documents to Japan by post
Preparing student visa documents and organizing all related procedures
Support in obtaining the visa sticker from the Japanese embassy after approval
consultingCourses.resultText: All complex steps become easier, faster, and more reliable for our students.
courseCommonBullets: Students receive a personal account in the StudentsApp platform
consultingCourses.coursePlanOne: 3 days per week plan: 13 classes per month
consultingCourses.coursePlanTwo: 5 days per week plan: 23 classes per month
